nasb.text: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazzelelponi.

esv.text: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazzelelponi,

cnv.text: 以坦的兒子是：耶斯列、伊施瑪、伊得巴；他們的妹妹名叫哈悉勒玻尼。

ccb.text: 以坦的儿子是耶斯列、伊施玛和伊得巴，女儿名叫哈悉勒玻尼。
